caption: A chest roentgenogram showed a ring-shaped pericardial calcification (arrows).
Chest radiography from case 1 showing a pneumomediastinum.
Ray of right hand showed a healing of the lesion after 2 years of evolution
Chest X-ray showing elevation of the right hemidiaphragm.

7.4.18: XR abdomen acute complete w/chest: dilated small bowel loops in LUQ, air fluid levels in right mid abdomen, paucity of large bowel gas, suggestive of small bowel obstruction, suggestion of free air.
Post-op MRI Brain, T1W axial section showing a well-defined lobulated non-enhancing cystic lesion in right parietal lobe communicating with right lateral ventricle with dilated occipital horn.
